items.title: Fifa blamed as World Cup trains set to cost $100
items.description: New Jersey Governor Mikie Sherrill accuses Fifa of failing to provide funding, which means fans must foot the bill for high transport costs at the World Cup this summer.

items.title: Manchester United-stjerne utestengt for banning
